subcodes.first_line: The denizens of My celestial dominion have lamented over that which hath befallen My loved ones who make mention of God at morn and eventide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ناح اهل جبروتی بما ورد علی اولیائی الذین یذکرون الله فی الغداه و العشی و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
